languages.text: {n}Раскатистый хохот Себериана похож на скрежет, с которым трутся друг о друга несмазанные шестерни.{/n} "Вот ты и явила свое истинное лицо, Ювенна. Сговорилась с Диодасом? Не ты ли привела его к воротам нашего дома? Я должен был догадаться раньше и лишить тебя права наследования, изменница. Посмотрим. Кто же последует за тобой?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Раскатистый хохот Себериана похож на скрежет, с которым трутся друг о друга несмазанные шестерни.{/n} "Вот, значит, как? Увидели, что я безоружен, и тут же явили свой истинный облик! Вероломная дщерь, будь у меня меч, твоя красивая голова уже валялась бы в пыли у моих ног, это верно!" {n}Он нависает над Ювенной, всматриваясь в ее лицо.{/n} "И кто же примет твою сторону, перебежчица? Кто поддержит тебя в малодушии?"

languages.text: {n}Seberian's rumbling laughter sounds like the grinding of unlubricated gears.{/n} "Now you have shown your true colours, Juvenna. Have you conspired with Diodas? Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"
languages.original_text: {n}Раскатистый хохот Себериана похож на скрежет, с которым трутся друг о друга несмазанные шестерни.{/n} "Вот ты и явила свое истинное лицо, Ювенна. Сговорилась с Диодасом? Не ты ли привела его к воротам нашего дома? Я должен был догадаться раньше и лишить тебя права наследования, изменница. Посмотрим. Кто же последует за тобой?"

Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"

Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"

{n}Seberian's rumbling laughter sounds like the grinding of unlubricated gears.{/n} "Now you have shown your true colours, Juvenna. Have you conspired with Diodas? Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安发出低沉的笑声，如同未经润滑的齿轮在摩擦作响。{/n}“你终于露出了真面目，尤文娜。你和狄奥达斯狼狈为奸？正是你，把他引至了家族之门？我早该看清你，剥夺你的继承权，叛徒。让我们拭目以待，有谁会追随你。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's rumbling laughter sounds like the grinding of unlubricated gears.{/n} "Now you have shown your true colours, Juvenna. Have you conspired with Diodas? Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安发出低沉的笑声，如同未经润滑的齿轮在摩擦作响。{/n}“你终于露出了真面目，尤文娜。你和狄奥达斯狼狈为奸？正是你，把他引至了家族之门？我早该看清你，剥夺你的继承权，叛徒。让我们拭目以待，有谁会追随你。”

languages.text: {n}Le rire grondant de Seberian rappelle le grincement de rouages non graissés.{/n} « Tu me montres enfin ton véritable visage, Juvenna. Tu es donc de mèche avec Diodas ? N'est-ce pas toi qui l'as conduit à nos portes ? J'aurais dû ouvrir les yeux plus tôt et te déshériter pour trahison. Nous en reparlerons. Qui va te suivre ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's rumbling laughter sounds like the grinding of unlubricated gears.{/n} "Now you have shown your true colours, Juvenna. Have you conspired with Diodas? Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le rire grondant de Seberian rappelle le grincement de rouages non graissés.{/n} « Tu me montres enfin ton véritable visage, Juvenna. Tu es donc de mèche avec Diodas ? N'est-ce pas toi qui l'as conduit à nos portes ? J'aurais dû ouvrir les yeux plus tôt et te déshériter pour trahison. Nous en reparlerons. Qui va te suivre ? »

languages.text: {n}La risa de Seberian te recuerda al rechinar de unos engranajes sin lubricar.{/n} «Por fin revela su verdadera naturaleza, Juvenna. ¿Ha conspirado con Diodas? ¿Es usted quien lo ha traído a las puertas de nuestra casa? Debería haberlo sabido antes y haberla desheredado, traidora. Pero veamos. ¿Quién la seguirá?».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's rumbling laughter sounds like the grinding of unlubricated gears.{/n} "Now you have shown your true colours, Juvenna. Have you conspired with Diodas? Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La risa de Seberian te recuerda al rechinar de unos engranajes sin lubricar.{/n} «Por fin revela su verdadera naturaleza, Juvenna. ¿Ha conspirado con Diodas? ¿Es usted quien lo ha traído a las puertas de nuestra casa? Debería haberlo sabido antes y haberla desheredado, traidora. Pero veamos. ¿Quién la seguirá?».

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın gürleyen kahkahası, yağlanmamış dişlilerin gıcırtısı gibi çıkıyor.{/n} "Gerçek yüzünü gösterdin Juvenna. Diodas'la komplo mu kurdun? Onu evimizin kapısına getiren sen değil miydin? Şimdiye değin fark etmeli ve seni mirastan men etmeliydim hain. Göreceğiz. Kimler sana katılacak?"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's rumbling laughter sounds like the grinding of unlubricated gears.{/n} "Now you have shown your true colours, Juvenna. Have you conspired with Diodas? Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın gürleyen kahkahası, yağlanmamış dişlilerin gıcırtısı gibi çıkıyor.{/n} "Gerçek yüzünü gösterdin Juvenna. Diodas'la komplo mu kurdun? Onu evimizin kapısına getiren sen değil miydin? Şimdiye değin fark etmeli ve seni mirastan men etmeliydim hain. Göreceğiz. Kimler sana katılacak?"

languages.text: {n}Seberians dröhnendes Lachen klingt wie das Knirschen ungeschmierter Zahnräder.{/n} "Jetzt habt Ihr Euer wahres Gesicht gezeigt, Juvenna. Habt Ihr mit Diodas konspiriert? Habt Ihr ihn an die Tore unseres Hauses geführt? Ich hätte es wissen und Euch enterben müssen, Verräterin." "Wir werden sehen. Wer wird Euch folgen?"
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's rumbling laughter sounds like the grinding of unlubricated gears.{/n} "Now you have shown your true colours, Juvenna. Have you conspired with Diodas? Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberians dröhnendes Lachen klingt wie das Knirschen ungeschmierter Zahnräder.{/n} "Jetzt habt Ihr Euer wahres Gesicht gezeigt, Juvenna. Habt Ihr mit Diodas konspiriert? Habt Ihr ihn an die Tore unseres Hauses geführt? Ich hätte es wissen und Euch enterben müssen, Verräterin." "Wir werden sehen. Wer wird Euch folgen?"

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの轟くような笑い声は、潤滑油の塗られていない歯車の擦れ音を思わせる。{/n} 「今やあなたは本性を現した、ユベナ。ディオダスと共謀したのか？彼の家門の門まで導いたのはあなただったのか？もっと早くに知っていれば、裏切り者であるあなたを家督から剥奪していた。誰があなたに従うのか、見てみろ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's rumbling laughter sounds like the grinding of unlubricated gears.{/n} "Now you have shown your true colours, Juvenna. Have you conspired with Diodas? Was it not you who led him to the gates of our house? I should have known sooner and disinherited you, traitor. We shall see. Who will follow you?"

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの轟くような笑い声は、潤滑油の塗られていない歯車の擦れ音を思わせる。{/n} 「今やあなたは本性を現した、ユベナ。ディオダスと共謀したのか？彼の家門の門まで導いたのはあなただったのか？もっと早くに知っていれば、裏切り者であるあなたを家督から剥奪していた。誰があなたに従うのか、見てみろ。」
